description: Send notifications to your own Microsoft Teams destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise workflows:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway / gateway-plus transformer channels instead compose your Microsoft Teams incoming webhook URL (webhook.office.com /webhookb2/ connector) from your stored secrets and POST a native MessageCard payload directly, bypassing Apprise.
name: msg-to-msteams

request.template: {"urls":"workflows://${ customer_secrets.MSTEAMS_HOST }/${ customer_secrets.MSTEAMS_WORKFLOW }/${ customer_secrets.MSTEAMS_SIGNATURE }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}

{"urls":"workflows://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.host_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.workflow_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.signature_secret }} }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}
